claimText: The Draft Seeds Bill, 2025 seeks to replace the Seeds Act, 1966, and the Seeds (Control) Order, 1983.
evidenceExcerpt: Draft Seeds Bill, 2025 replaces the Seeds Act, 1966, and Seeds (Control) Order, 1983.
examUse: Statement-based question on the legislative framework being replaced by the new bill.
distractorHooks: Replaces the Protection of Plant Varieties and Farmers' Rights Act, 2001

claimText: Under the Draft Seeds Bill, 2025, the sale of unregistered seeds is prohibited, except for farmers' varieties and seeds produced exclusively for export.
evidenceExcerpt: Un-registered seeds cannot be sold, except for farmers' varieties and seeds produced exclusively for export.
examUse: Statement-based question testing knowledge of exemptions in seed registration.
distractorHooks: No exemptions exist for the sale of unregistered seeds
Imported seeds are exempt from registration
Farmers' varieties must be registered before sale

claimText: The SATHI portal, created by MoAFW and NIC, is mandated for complete seed traceability from origin to farmer.
evidenceExcerpt: SATHI portal (MoAFW + NIC) ensures complete traceability of seeds from origin to farmer.
examUse: Correct-pair or statement-based question on the nodal ministry and purpose of the SATHI portal.
distractorHooks: Developed by the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change
Onboarding on the SATHI portal is voluntary for seed sellers

claimText: The Draft Seeds Bill, 2025 mandates the constitution of both Central and State Seed Committees.
evidenceExcerpt: Central and State Seed Committees will be constituted.
examUse: Statement-based question on the institutional bodies established under the bill.
distractorHooks: Only a Central Seed Committee is constituted
District-level Seed Committees are mandated by the bill

claimText: Seed varieties must conform to the Indian Minimum Seed Certification Standards under the Draft Seeds Bill, 2025.
evidenceExcerpt: Seed varieties must conform to the Indian Minimum Seed Certification Standards.
examUse: Statement-based question on the quality standards required for seed varieties.
distractorHooks: Must conform to Codex Alimentarius standards
Must conform to International Seed Testing Association (ISTA) standards only
